inclusions: Room rent up to Rs. 5,000 per day
exclusions: Treatment for pre-existing conditions within first 12 months
Dental care not related to accident
text: HDFC Ergo Easy is the low-premium choice for users with a modest budget. It offers a 12-month waiting period and a 5% co-pay, making it a fit for Tier-2 and Tier-3 city members seeking affordable hospital cover.
